title: Evidence Record
description: Shape of a single evidence record emitted by a compliance-as-code connector. A connector run may emit either one record (object) or many (array of objects).

source.description: The connector that produced this record (e.g., 'aws-iam', 'github', 'okta'). Stable across runs.

event_type.description: Logical event category that downstream agents and policies key on (e.g., 'iam_user_snapshot', 'branch_protection_rule', 'mfa_factor').

resource_id.description: Stable identifier for the resource within its source. Should be enough to look the resource up in the source system.

collected_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp recording when the connector collected this record.

control_hints.description: Optional list of framework control IDs this record is plausibly evidence for. Hints only; downstream mappers make the authoritative call.

payload.description: Connector-specific structured data. Flat or nested. Must not contain personally identifying information; redact at the connector boundary.
